prompt:
Create a cinematic storyboard page in a 2x3 grid (6 panels) in a single image, 3D Pixar-like style, soft warm lighting, based on the Gugu Gaga kigurumi universe. This page is “Share Your Light – Part 1” and should feel self-contained for a 15 second short. Consistent characters across all panels: 

- Gugu Gaga Penguin: tiny chibi child in a black penguin mascot suit with white belly, yellow feet, yellow beak hood, short messy dark hair, blue hair clip, collar ring and diagonal strap.

- Sunny Chick: tiny chibi child in a round yellow chick suit with tiny orange beak, short curly orange hair, sunflower hairpin.

Include simple speech bubbles with the exact dialogue in quotes. No other text on the page.

Panel 1 (top left) – Opening loneliness:
Evening in a small cozy playground at sunset, soft orange light. Wide shot. Gugu Penguin sits alone at the edge of a sandbox, shoulders slumped, penguin feet dangling, a small dim glowing lantern toy beside them. Background slightly blurred with empty swings. Speech bubble from Gugu: “My light is so small… no one even notices me.”

Panel 2 (top middle) – Closer sadness:
Medium shot closer on Gugu. The lantern glow is weak on their suit. Gugu looks at their own reflection in the lantern, eyes watery. Background still mostly empty. Speech bubble from Gugu: “Maybe I should just hide it.”

Panel 3 (top right) – First contact:
Same playground, medium two-shot. Sunny Chick waddles into frame from the side holding a tiny paper star garland, looking kind and curious. Gugu glances up, surprised. Warm colors, sunset behind them. Speech bubble from Sunny: “Hey… I noticed. Your light got me here.”

Panel 4 (bottom left) – Sitting together:
Two-shot of Gugu and Sunny now sitting together on the sandbox edge, the lantern between them glowing softly on their kigurumi suits. Background park lights starting to appear as little bokeh dots. Sunny’s body language open and friendly. Speech bubble from Gugu: “Really? It doesn’t feel like much.”

Panel 5 (bottom middle) – Soft reassurance:
Slightly closer on Sunny and Gugu. Sunny leans in, smiling gently, one wing-like arm gesturing toward the lantern. Lantern glow a little brighter. Speech bubble from Sunny: “It was bright enough for me to find you.”

Panel 6 (bottom right) – Part 1 hook:
Medium close two-shot, the lantern centered between their faces. Gugu looks uncertain but hopeful. Sunny’s eyes shining in the warm light. Background faded. Speech bubble from Gugu: “But what if it’s not enough to help anyone?” No other text; leave the emotional question hanging at the end of Part 1.
